title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Bullet - UVC AI bullet camera
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Bullet
description: The camera from the UniFi Protect family has a 5MP sensor (2688 Ã 1512px) at 30 fps, a fixed lens of approx. 4 mm (not specified by the manufacturer, derived from the viewing angle) , IR illuminator for night vision and an audio microphone with the option to turn it off. The camera has a durable aluminum and polycarbonate chassis, IK04 resistance against vandals and IP65 protection against dust and jet water. The camera can only be connected to the network using Gigabit LAN with support for… 5MP, 30 FPS video (reduced to 4MP, max. 2688 Ã 1512px) Night mode with IR LEDs, IR cut filter IP65 weatherproof cover Built-in microphone with software shutdown option Smart object detection - people (max.10 m), cars (max.20 m) Power supply via PoE (37 to 57 V DC) Managed by UniFi Protect software - 1.20.0 (web) / 1.5.6 (iOS) / 1.4.7 (android) Resistance to vandals - IK04 Note: AI powered vehicle classification and pet detection feature will be added in future fw releases Device Screws + dowels Wall mount
